original_statement: what ferry was delivered directly after princess teguise?
mutated_statement: what something was done directly after another thing?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Proper-name anonymization + Action generalization: specific vessel type generalized (ferry → something) | proper name anonymized (princess teguise → another thing) | specific action generalized (was delivered → was done)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志中多处critique/judge_thought识别出模糊性：如多次出现的评述“the question ‘what something was done directly after another thing?’ is incomplete and does not specify…”“问题模糊，不明确”等文本，明确表明agent意识到问题不明确。同时，agent在执行链中仍多次尝试给出具体猜测：在多次simple_query和thought里产生并论证“rocket 3”为紧随“rocket”之后的项（例如“Thus, ‘rocket 3’ was done directly after ‘rocket.’”）。尽管最终的Prediction Answer为空，agent的内部推理和输出尝试表明它是在在意识到歧义的前提下仍进行推测。因此将其归类为“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”。
